main.description: Download a single sealed-segment block by index. Returns the raw zstd-compressed block frame exactly as stored on disk (no 8-byte length prefix; Content-Length carries the length). The response is immutable for a given ETag and is CDN-cacheable. Clients fetch the blocks named by a query plan and decode each frame with the standard block decoder.

segment.description: The sealed segment filename, e.g. seg_000000002a.jss (same value returned by listSegments and accepted by getSegment).

blockIndex.description: Zero-based block index within the segment. Must be < the segment's block_count.

errors.name: SegmentNotFound
errors.description: No sealed segment exists for the given name.
